_doc: Behavioral & economic tuning that lives outside balance.json (which is per-mode bet sizing). Values here drive guard-rails, depth hints, and risk rounds.

game_depth._doc: Used to grey-out denominations the player can't afford for a meaningful session. balance / (denom * max_bet * num_hands) >= min_rounds_to_play -> denom is allowed.

auto_shop._doc: When player's balance can't cover the next bet. trigger_below_min_bet=true opens shop overlay automatically.

double_or_nothing._doc: Risk round after a winning hand. Players double their last_win or lose it.

starting_balance._doc: Mirror of init_config.starting_balance for organisational clarity. ConfigManager reads from init_config; setting here is a no-op unless wired explicitly.

_max_bet_note: min/max coin-bet per mode are NOT tunable via config — they are structural constants (1..5) tied to paytable column count in machines.json. Don't try to expose them here. Ultra VP activation cost is hardcoded as ULTRA_BET=2*MAX_BET=10 in multi_hand_manager.gd.
